text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: ""Soon guess who barges inside the room? Tweedledee and Tweedledum! Witkoff and Kushner, with messages from Netanyahu. And after that, there was a phone call from Netanyahu to Vance. After that, the whole thing started to derail." Pepe Escobar on DD Geopolitics…" "The Houthis are just waiting for the right moment to announce: 'Yes, that's it, we're going to block it all.' From Hormuz to Suez to Bab el-Mandeb and back to Hormuz—it's a perfect triangle. Some Yemenis are calling it the Alaqsa Triangle blockade." Pepe Escobar warns of looming multi-strait blockade across Red Sea and Persian Gulf. The U.S. Navy faces "round two" with Ansarullah if Yemen closes the triangle. "Who the hell in the National Security Council has the balls to make a 20-second visual presentation to the president proving this is completely suicidal?" FULL EPISODE !! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“很快，猜猜谁闯进了房间？叮当咚和叮当当！威特科夫（Witkoff）和库什纳（Kushner），带着内塔尼亚胡的消息。在那之后，内塔尼亚胡给万斯（Vance）打了个电话。在那之后，整件事就开始脱轨了。” 佩佩·埃斯科巴（Pepe Escobar）在 DD Geopolitics 上…… “胡塞武装只是在等待合适的时机宣布：‘是的，就是这样，我们要把它全部封锁。’ 从霍尔木兹到苏伊士，再到曼德海峡，最后回到霍尔木兹——这是一个完美的三角形。一些也门人称之为阿克萨三角封锁。” 佩佩·埃斯科巴警告称，红海和波斯湾即将出现多海峡封锁。如果也门关闭这个三角形，美国海军将面临与安萨尔真主（Ansarullah）的“第二轮”较量。“国家安全委员会里到底有谁有胆量向总统做一个20秒的视觉演示，证明这是完全自杀的行为？” 完整剧集！！ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “I recognize that a lot of young voters don’t love the policy that we have in the Middle East (West Asia). I’m not saying you have to agree with me on every issue, what I’m saying is don’t get disengaged because you disagree with the administration on one topic. Get more involved” — Vance - > Netanyahu said: “Vance, on his way back from Islamabad, reported to me – as he does every day.” If you side with Vance, you’re siding with Netanyahu, the child killer.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “我承认很多年轻选民不喜欢我们在中东（西亚）的政策。我不是说你必须在每个问题上都同意我，我想说的是，不要因为你不同意政府在某个话题上的观点就变得消极。多参与进来。” —— 万斯 -> 内塔尼亚胡说：“万斯在从伊斯兰堡回来的路上向我汇报——就像他每天做的那样。” 如果你站在万斯一边，你就是站在杀童犯内塔尼亚胡一边。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇺🇸🇮🇷 A US Navy maritime patrol MQ-4C drone may have crashed at around 10h15 UTC in the Persian gulf. After a routine patrol over the strait of Hormuz the drone headed back to its base in Italy. The drone then declared emergency and turned to the gulf while…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The U.S. Navy has confirmed that an MQ-4C crashed on April 9th. The location of the crash wasn't indicated in the document due to operational security concerns. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇺🇸🇮🇷 一架美国海军海上巡逻 MQ-4C 无人机可能于协调世界时 10 点 15 分左右在波斯湾坠毁。在霍尔木兹海峡进行例行巡逻后，该无人机返回意大利基地。随后该无人机宣布紧急情况并转向海湾，同时……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国海军已证实一架 MQ-4C 于 4 月 9 日坠毁。由于作战安全考虑，文件中未说明坠毁地点。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 ⚡️ The State Department’s Rewards for Justice program released a photo it claims shows Ahmad al-Hamidawi, leader of Kataib Hezbollah, offering up to $10M for information. Just a reminder: the US has not yet paid the person who ratted out Maduro.
text_zh: 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 国务院的“正义奖赏”计划发布了一张照片，声称是真主党旅（Kataib Hezbollah）领导人艾哈迈德·哈米达维（Ahmad al-Hamidawi），悬赏高达 1000 万美元征集信息。提醒一下：美国还没有支付给那个举报马杜罗（Maduro）的人赏金。

text: WarMonitor Trump told a Fox News anchor the Iran war is “over,” even though no deal is in place and the Strait of Hormuz remains blocked. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普告诉福克斯新闻主播，伊朗战争已经“结束”，尽管目前还没有达成任何协议，霍尔木兹海峡仍然处于封锁状态。 推文

text: WarMonitor Apparently attacking the Pope is the new campaign strategy. JD Vance ATTACKS Pope Leo: He said that God is never on the side of those who wield the sword. How can you say that? Was God on the side of the Americans who liberated France from the Nazis? Was God on the side of the Americans who liberated Holocaust camps? https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2044187967267221739/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 显然，攻击教皇是新的竞选策略。JD·万斯攻击教皇利奥（Pope Leo）：他说上帝从不站在挥剑者的一边。你怎么能这么说？上帝站在将法国从纳粹手中解放出来的美国人一边吗？上帝站在解放大屠杀集中营的美国人一边吗？ https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2044187967267221739/video/1 - 反特朗普共和党人推文

text: Open Source Intel Interesting to note: The United States was producing 13.58 million barrels per day in 2025, about 16% of global crude supply. It was exporting roughly 4 million barrels per day of crude. Iran shuts the Strait of Hormuz. U.S. April exports jumped to 4.9 million barrels per day, and May is tracking 5.2 million, an all time record. 28 supertankers are booked for May. Normally it is around 5. Asian buyers that once depended on Hormuz are now turning to U.S. supply. In some strange way, the Strait of Hormuz being blocked is actually the biggest payday U.S. oil has ever had. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 有趣的是：美国在 2025 年每天生产 1358 万桶石油，约占全球原油供应量的 16%。它每天出口约 400 万桶原油。伊朗关闭了霍尔木兹海峡。美国 4 月份的出口量跃升至每天 490 万桶，5 月份预计将达到 520 万桶，创下历史新高。5 月份已预订了 28 艘超级油轮。通常只有 5 艘左右。曾经依赖霍尔木兹海峡的亚洲买家现在正转向美国供应。从某种奇怪的角度来看，霍尔木兹海峡被封锁实际上是美国石油业有史以来最大的发薪日。 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Free Palestine TV تلفزيون تحرير فلسطين: The People of Lebanon Rally Against Normalization Hadi Hoteit and Evan Katsounis visit a recent rally staged at the Government Palace in Beirut against the unprecedented direct talks between the Lebanese proxy regime of Nawaf Shalom and the Zionist Entity amidst its genocidal campaign on the region. The two interview supporters of the resistance and families displaced by the Jewish invasion of South Lebanon. Filmed on: 11/4/2026 Producer: Laith Marouf Editor: Rabih Ghannam & Ali Hayek Donate/Watch/Share elsewhere 👇 https://www.FreePalestine.Video
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Free Palestine TV تلفزيون تحرير فلسطين：黎巴嫩人民反对正常化。哈迪·霍泰特（Hadi Hoteit）和埃文·卡苏尼斯（Evan Katsounis）参观了最近在贝鲁特政府宫举行的集会，抗议纳瓦夫·沙洛姆（Nawaf Shalom）的黎巴嫩代理政权与犹太复国主义实体之间史无前例的直接会谈，当时该实体正在该地区进行种族灭绝运动。两人采访了抵抗运动的支持者和因犹太人入侵黎巴嫩南部而流离失所的家庭。拍摄日期：2026年4月11日。制片人：莱斯·马鲁夫（Laith Marouf）。剪辑：拉比·加纳姆（Rabih Ghannam）和阿里·哈耶克（Ali Hayek）。捐赠/观看/分享请点击此处 👇 https://www.FreePalestine.Video

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Alleged reports from opposition media of two strong explosions in west Tehran, coinciding with reports of a car bombing. Reports, from opposition outlets, suggest a car bomb went off in the Jeyhoun area near Goli intersection, targeting the Imam Khomeini…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian state media IRIB reports that the explosion reported earlier was from a homemade sound device planted by saboteurs in Tehran's tenth district. They allege the saboteurs planned on causing far and distress amongst civilians there. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 反对派媒体据称报道德黑兰西部发生两次强烈爆炸，同时有汽车炸弹的报道。来自反对派媒体的报道称，杰洪（Jeyhoun）地区靠近戈利（Goli）十字路口发生了一起汽车炸弹爆炸，目标是霍梅尼……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗国家媒体 IRIB 报道称，早些时候报道的爆炸是由破坏分子在德黑兰第十区放置的自制发声装置引起的。他们声称破坏分子计划在那里引起平民的恐慌和不安。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "JD Vance:The person who is effectively running Iran sat across from the Vice President of the U.S.—that had never happened." He contradicted himself He literally said yesterday Iran had to leave back to Tehran to ask the real leadership about making a deal
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“JD·万斯：实际上管理伊朗的人坐在美国副总统对面——这种情况从未发生过。” 他自相矛盾了。他昨天明明说伊朗必须回到德黑兰去问真正的领导层关于达成协议的事。

text: JD Vance: Trump says to Iran: “If you commit to not having a nuclear weapon, we are going to make Iran economically thrive.”
text_zh: JD·万斯：特朗普对伊朗说：“如果你承诺不拥有核武器，我们将使伊朗经济繁荣。”

text: JD Vance: I recognize that a lot of young voters don’t love the policy we have in the Middle East.
text_zh: JD·万斯：我承认很多年轻选民不喜欢我们在中东的政策。

text: VP Vance was confronted at a TPUSA event: “You’re killing children!”
text_zh: 副总统万斯在 TPUSA 活动上遭到质问：“你们在杀害儿童！”

text: 🇺🇸 $240 million US MQ-4C crashes in Persian Gulf — TWZ. US Navy labels it ‘mishap’ — ‘Suddenly’ disappeared operating over Persian Gulf on April 9.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 2.4 亿美元的美国 MQ-4C 在波斯湾坠毁 — TWZ。美国海军称其为“事故” — 4 月 9 日在波斯湾上空作业时“突然”消失。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Trump says Iran war ‘over’ — Maria Bartiromo after a visit to the White House. You never know what Trump will say in the next 30 minutes. He is not the one making the decisions.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 特朗普称伊朗战争“结束” — 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫在访问白宫后表示。你永远不知道特朗普在接下来的 30 分钟内会说什么。他不是做决定的人。

text: OSINTdefender Three people were lightly injured and multiple buildings and cars damaged when a pair of improvised liquified-gas bombs exploded earlier tonight near a security forces checkpoint on Imam Khomeini Street in the District 10 of Tehran, according to the Iranian state-run Fars News Agency. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据伊朗官方通讯社法尔斯通讯社报道，今天晚上早些时候，德黑兰第 10 区霍梅尼街的一个安全检查站附近发生两枚简易液化气炸弹爆炸，造成三人轻伤，多座建筑物和汽车受损。 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump tells Fox News that the Iran War is over. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044185187433468363/photo/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor A man who filmed an F-15 crash in Kuwait has been jailed since March 2, and his X and Instagram accounts have been taken down. His arrest comes amid a broader wave in which hundreds have been detained for filming similar incidents, with critics calling it a crackdown on dissent. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044184652227764537/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一名拍摄了科威特 F-15 坠机事件的男子自 3 月 2 日起被监禁，他的 X 和 Instagram 账号已被注销。他的被捕发生在一波更广泛的浪潮中，数百人因拍摄类似事件而被拘留，批评者称这是对异议的镇压。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044184652227764537/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index US Vice President JD Vance says if Iran commits to not have a nuclear weapon, 'we are going to make Iran economically thrive'. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044182809380827586/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国副总统 JD·万斯表示，如果伊朗承诺不拥有核武器，“我们将使伊朗经济繁荣”。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044182809380827586/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 Explosion in District 10 of Tehran involving a homemade explosive device; minor damage and no casualties. — Shortly before, two homemade explosive devices based on liquefied gas detonated on Imam Khomeini Street (District 10 of Tehran, near Jeyhun). —…" 🇮🇷 The explosion an hour ago in District 10 of Tehran was reportedly linked to sabotage by traitorous agents — IRIB
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷 德黑兰第 10 区发生爆炸，涉及自制爆炸装置；轻微损坏，无人员伤亡。——在此之前不久，两枚基于液化气的自制爆炸装置在霍梅尼街（德黑兰第 10 区，靠近杰洪）引爆。——……” 🇮🇷 据报道，一小时前在德黑兰第 10 区发生的爆炸与叛国特工的破坏活动有关 —— IRIB

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "A U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton surveillance drone crashed on April 9 over the Persian Gulf." Notice the other mishaps? How do they happen to the literal U.S air force that set the standards for such jets but never to the Israeli air force
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Lebanese News and Updates：“一架美国海军 MQ-4C 海神侦察无人机于 4 月 9 日在波斯湾上空坠毁。” 注意到其他事故了吗？为什么它们会发生在为这种喷气式飞机设定标准的美国空军身上，却从未发生在以色列空军身上？

text: BREAKING! THE WAR ON IRAN IS OVER (according to Trump) "I said to him, Mr President, you keep talking about the war like, was was, was? I said, is it over? He said, it's over, over." — Maria Bartiromo after a visit to the White House 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 突发！伊朗战争结束了（据特朗普所说）“我对他说，总统先生，你一直谈论这场战争，好像是过去式？我说，它结束了吗？他说，结束了，结束了。” —— 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫在访问白宫后表示 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 SOUTHCOM announced that they struck a suspected narcotics trafficking vessel in the Eastern Pacific ocean earlier today. Four narcotics traffickers were killed in the strike. @wfwitness

text: 🇵🇱 🇮🇱 Israel condemns 'antisemitic horror in Polish Parliament by MP Berkowicz'. Calls on Poland to 'remove this moral stain'. Berkowicz: “And I condemn your genocide across all of Palestine. I consider you Nazis.”
text_zh: 🇵🇱 🇮🇱 以色列谴责“波兰议员贝尔科维奇（Berkowicz）在波兰议会中的反犹太恐怖行为”。呼吁波兰“消除这一道德污点”。贝尔科维奇：“我也谴责你们在整个巴勒斯坦的种族灭绝。我认为你们是纳粹。”

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Rambam Hospital in Haifa is receiving a steady influx of wounded Israeli soldiers evacuated by helicopter from south Lebanon, with medical teams working continuously alongside the military. — Yedioth Ahronoth
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 海法的拉姆巴姆（Rambam）医院不断接收从黎巴嫩南部直升机撤离的受伤以色列士兵，医疗团队与军方并肩不间断地工作。 —— 耶路撒冷邮报（Yedioth Ahronoth）

text: The U.S. State Department has told Congress that Cuba may be complicit in supporting Russia’s war in Ukraine, with up to 5,000 Cuban nationals reportedly fighting on Russia’s side. The report says there’s no definitive proof Havana officially sent troops, but cites “significant indicators” the regime tolerated or enabled their involvement. Source: Axios
text_zh: 美国国务院已告知国会，古巴可能参与支持俄罗斯在乌克兰的战争，据报道有多达 5000 名古巴国民在俄罗斯一方作战。报告称，没有确凿证据表明哈瓦那正式派遣了军队，但引用了“重要迹象”表明该政权容忍或促成了他们的参与。来源：Axios

text: JD Vance is expected to lead a potential second round of talks with Iranian officials if negotiations continue before next week’s ceasefire deadline. Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are also expected to attend. Source: CNN
text_zh: 如果谈判在下周停火截止日期前继续进行，预计 JD·万斯将领导与伊朗官员的潜在第二轮会谈。史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）和贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）也预计将出席。来源：CNN

text: JD Vance: The people who want to kill Donald Trump, the people who want to throw Donald Trump into prison, the people who murdered our friend, and the people who celebrated afterwards are trying to achieve political power. We cannot let them.
text_zh: JD·万斯：那些想要杀死唐纳德·特朗普的人，那些想要把唐纳德·特朗普投入监狱的人，那些谋杀了我们朋友的人，以及那些事后庆祝的人，正在试图获得政治权力。我们不能让他们得逞。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Fox News host Maria Bartiromo says President Donald Trump referred to the Iran war in the past tense during an interview, telling her “it’s over” when asked directly. The interview is set to air tomorrow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 福克斯新闻主持人玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫表示，唐纳德·特朗普总统在接受采访时用过去时态提到了伊朗战争，当被直接问及时，他告诉她“已经结束了”。采访定于明天播出。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇮🇹 The Israeli regime ambassador to Italy labels the L'Espresso magazine as "antisemitic" for showing the reality! The magazine used a real photo of a Jewish Israeli settler harassing a Palestinian woman.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇮🇹 以色列驻意大利政权大使将《L'Espresso》杂志贴上“反犹太”标签，因为它展示了现实！该杂志使用了一张犹太以色列定居者骚扰巴勒斯坦妇女的真实照片。

text: JD Vance: The person who is effectively running Iran sat across from the Vice President of the U.S.—that had never happened. I think those people wanted to make a deal… you never know, though.
text_zh: JD·万斯：实际上管理伊朗的人坐在美国副总统对面——这种情况从未发生过。我认为那些人想达成协议……不过，你永远不知道。

text: JD Vance: Trump says to Iran: “If you commit to not having a nuclear weapon, we are going to make Iran economically thrive.”
text_zh: JD·万斯：特朗普对伊朗说：“如果你承诺不拥有核武器，我们将使伊朗经济繁荣。”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance on catholic reaction to Trump’s attack of the Pope: It has frustrated me that some of the Catholic clergy have attacked mercilessly the Trump Administration on immigration...and my constant response to that is, how is it humane to allow drug traffickers and sex traffickers to bring little kids across the southern border? @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 美国副总统 J.D. 万斯对天主教徒对特朗普攻击教皇的反应表示：一些天主教神职人员无情地攻击特朗普政府的移民政策让我感到沮丧……我对此的持续回应是，允许毒贩和人口贩子把小孩带过南部边境，这怎么能说是人道的呢？ @wfwitness

text: JD Vance: I recognize that a lot of young voters don’t love the policy we have in the Middle East.
text_zh: JD·万斯：我承认很多年轻选民不喜欢我们在中东的政策。

text: WarMonitor Trump is pushing Congress to extend FISA Section 702, the same surveillance program he criticized in 2024. (Reuters) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044178627755995459/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普正在推动国会延长《外国情报监视法》（FISA）第 702 条，这正是他在 2024 年批评过的同一个监视计划。（路透社） https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044178627755995459/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Aviation_Intel : Navy MQ-4C Triton Surveillance Drone Crash In The Middle East Finally Confirmed The MQ-4C had been flying over the Persian Gulf on April 9 when it suddenly disappeared from online flight tracking sites. https://www.twz.com/air/navy-mq-4c-triton-surveillance-drone-crash-in-the-middle-east-finally-confirmed tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @Aviation_Intel：海军 MQ-4C 海神侦察无人机在中东坠毁终于得到证实。MQ-4C 于 4 月 9 日在波斯湾上空飞行时，突然从在线飞行跟踪网站上消失。 https://www.twz.com/air/navy-mq-4c-triton-surveillance-drone-crash-in-the-middle-east-finally-confirmed 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The US Navy has confirmed that it lost a $240 million MQ-4C Triton reconnaissance drone last week, likely this one that crashed into the Persian Gulf after scouting the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044176219990622584/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 美国海军已证实，它上周损失了一架价值 2.4 亿美元的 MQ-4C 海神侦察无人机，很可能就是这架在侦察霍尔木兹海峡后坠入波斯湾的无人机。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044176219990622584/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor The U.S. birthrate has fallen nearly 20% since 2007, with experts pointing to rising costs making it harder for people to afford having kids. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044176060787384404/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 自 2007 年以来，美国的出生率下降了近 20%，专家指出，生活成本上升使得人们更难负担得起生孩子。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044176060787384404/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to the Wall Street Journal, citing two U.S. officials, 20 commercial vessels, including cargo, container and tanker vessels, have transited the Strait of Hormuz in the past 24 hours. The vessels, abiding by the now in place U.S. blockade of the strait, did not visit Iranian ports, per the report. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华尔街日报》援引两名美国官员的话称，过去 24 小时内，有 20 艘商船（包括货船、集装箱船和油轮）通过了霍尔木兹海峡。据报道，这些船只遵守了目前实施的美国对海峡的封锁，没有访问伊朗港口。 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 Two car bombs exploded on Imam Khomeini Street in Tehran near a Basij checkpoint, with no casualties reported so far. ➡️ Security forces have sealed off the area and defused a third device, and people are being urged to stay away. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 两枚汽车炸弹在德黑兰霍梅尼街的一个巴斯基（Basij）检查站附近爆炸，目前尚未有人员伤亡报告。 ➡️ 安全部队已封锁该地区并拆除了第三个装置，并敦促人们远离。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel Ambassador to the U.S.: “We certainly don’t want the French anywhere near these negotiations; we’d like to keep them as far away as possible from pretty much everything, particularly peace negotiations.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044174345103085755/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列驻美大使：“我们当然不希望法国人参与这些谈判；我们希望让他们尽可能远离几乎所有事情，特别是和平谈判。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044174345103085755/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Trump's DOJ is now asking a court to vacate parts of the seditious conspiracy convictions against Proud Boys leaders in the Jan. 6 case, a sign they’re trying to chip away at those rulings. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普的司法部现在正要求法院撤销 1 月 6 日案件中针对“骄傲男孩”（Proud Boys）领导人的煽动性阴谋定罪的部分内容，这是一个他们试图削弱这些裁决的迹象。 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) US President Trump to Fox News' Maria Bartiromo about the war with Iran: "It's over." https://twitter.com/MariaBartiromo/status/2044168738086498306/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）美国总统特朗普对福克斯新闻的玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫谈到与伊朗的战争：“结束了。” https://twitter.com/MariaBartiromo/status/2044168738086498306/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : According to Reuters, citing two Trump administration officials, the Trump administration will let the 30-day waiver on the delivery, sale, and offloading of Iranian-origin crude oil and petroleum products expire without renewing it. The waiver, implemented on March 20, 2026, is set to expire at 12:01 a.m. EST on April 19, 2026, amidst the U.S. naval blockade of vessels entering or exiting Iranian ports through the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender：据路透社援引两名特朗普政府官员的话称，特朗普政府将让针对伊朗原油和石油产品交付、销售和卸货的 30 天豁免权到期，不再续期。该豁免权于 2026 年 3 月 20 日实施，定于 2026 年 4 月 19 日美国东部时间凌晨 12:01 到期，正值美国海军封锁通过霍尔木兹海峡进出伊朗港口的船只之际。 推文

text: VP Vance was confronted at a TPUSA event: “You’re killing children!”
text_zh: 副总统万斯在 TPUSA 活动上遭到质问：“你们在杀害儿童！”

text: 🇮🇷 Explosion in District 10 of Tehran involving a homemade explosive device; minor damage and no casualties. — Shortly before, two homemade explosive devices based on liquefied gas detonated on Imam Khomeini Street (District 10 of Tehran, near Jeyhun). — Field investigations by a Fars reporter indicate that the explosion shattered the windows of three houses and caused minor damage to two cars. — The incident resulted in no casualties, as both devices were incomplete. Three people sustained superficial injuries in the incident.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 德黑兰第 10 区发生爆炸，涉及自制爆炸装置；轻微损坏，无人员伤亡。——在此之前不久，两枚基于液化气的自制爆炸装置在霍梅尼街（德黑兰第 10 区，靠近杰洪）引爆。——法尔斯通讯社记者的实地调查显示，爆炸震碎了三所房屋的窗户，并对两辆汽车造成轻微损坏。——事件未造成人员伤亡，因为两个装置都不完整。事件中有三人受轻伤。

text: JD Vance: How can you say that God was never on the side of those who wield the sword? Audience member: Jesus doesn’t support genocide. JD Vance: I agree.
text_zh: JD·万斯：你怎么能说上帝从不站在挥剑者的一边？观众：耶稣不支持种族灭绝。JD·万斯：我同意。

text: 🛢 Dated Brent, the benchmark used to price physical crude worldwide, has officially exceeded the Great Financial Crisis peak. At the same time, the nearest Brent futures contract for June delivery is trading at ~$100 per barrel. The spread between the two has surged to ~$35 per barrel, compared to a historical norm of $1-2. This comes as ~13 million barrels per day of supply remains missing from the market, forcing European and Asian refiners to compete aggressively for whatever cargoes are available. The historic gap signals a market that cannot source enough barrels for immediate delivery, even as futures prices assume supply will normalize later. 🔗 Global Markets Investor
text_zh: 🛢 用于全球实物原油定价的基准布伦特原油（Dated Brent）已正式超过大金融危机期间的峰值。与此同时，最近的 6 月交割布伦特原油期货合约交易价格约为每桶 100 美元。两者之间的价差已飙升至每桶约 35 美元，而历史常态为 1-2 美元。这是因为市场上仍有约每天 1300 万桶的供应缺口，迫使欧洲和亚洲的炼油商为任何可用的货物进行激烈竞争。这种历史性的差距表明，市场无法获得足够的即时交割石油，即使期货价格假设供应量稍后会恢复正常。 🔗 全球市场投资者
